I am Maria Clara. I am from Maceio.
Clarinha is my granddaughter. She is three years old.
We are a big family. We are in Brazil.
Are you from Brazil? Yes, I am.
Hello! Welcome to the university. My name is David. I am a teacher here.
Hello, David. Nice to meet you. My name is Maria Clara.
Nice to meet you too. Where are you from, Maria Clara?
I am from Maceio, in Brazil. I work at a university, like you.
Wonderful. I am from Canada, but now I live here in China. Do you have family in Brazil?
Yes, I have a big family. I have three children and one granddaughter.
That is lovely. How old is your granddaughter?
She is three years old. Her name is Clarinha. She studies English at school.
Beautiful. My daughter studies English too. Welcome to China, Maria Clara.
Thank you, David. I speak English, and I am improving.
Sorry, I don't understand. Could you repeat, please?
Could you speak more slowly, please?
How do you say this in English?
I need a moment to think. Thank you for your patience.
Hello! My name is Maria Clara. Nice to meet you.
I am from Maceio, in Brazil.
I work at a university. I have a big family.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to our university. My name is Daniel. I am very happy to meet the group from Brazil. Today we visit three places. First, we visit the library. Then we have coffee together. At twelve o'clock, we have lunch in the main hall. Please stay with the group. If you have a question, you can ask me. Have a wonderful day.

Hello, Maria Clara. This is Grace from the university office. Welcome to China. I have two small things for you. First, your name badge is ready. You can take it at the front desk. Second, we have a welcome dinner on Tuesday, at seven o'clock. Please tell me if you can come. Thank you, and see you soon.
Hello! My name is Maria Clara. I am from Maceio. I work at a university. Nice to meet you.
